name: Java Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a buttered 3-quart saucepan, combine the first five ingredients and bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
2. Boil without stirring until it reaches the thread stage or until a candy thermometer registers 234°F. Remove from heat.
3. Add butter and vanilla. Do not stir.
4. Cool to 110°F. Beat until fudge starts to lose its gloss, about 10 minutes.
5. Pour into a buttered 8-inch square pan.
6. Allow to cool and cut into squares. Makes 1-3/4 pounds.
